nodes.context: Italian American Mafia crime family based in San Jose, California, active from c. 1940s to 2000s.
Nationwide criminal organization that includes the San Jose crime family and other families.
New York-based crime family that controlled organized crime in San Jose alongside the San Jose family.
New York Mafia family; Joseph Cerrito met with former underboss Frank Garofalo in 1964.
Mafia family based in San Francisco; boss James Lanza was close with Angelo Marino.
Mafia family based in Los Angeles; consigliere Frank Bompensiero was close with Angelo Marino.
Mafia family based in Pittsburgh; Salvatore Marino (father of Angelo) was a longtime member.
Mafia family based in Chicago; listed as an ally in the infobox.
Mafia family based in Dallas; listed as an ally in the infobox.
Outlaw motorcycle gang; listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The San Jose family was one of the two families that controlled organized crime in San Jose, within the nationwide criminal organization known as the American Mafia (or "La Cosa Nostra")
edges.context: The San Jose crime family is a constituent family within the American Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: the other family that ran organized crime in the city was the Segovia crime family of New York
edges.context: The San Jose and Segovia families both controlled organized crime in San Jose.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1964, he was spotted meeting Bonanno crime family former underboss Frank Garofalo at a hotel in Palermo, Sicily.
edges.context: Joseph Cerrito, boss of the San Jose family, met with a Bonanno family member, suggesting a cooperative relationship.

edges.evidence_quote: Marino was close with San Francisco crime family boss James Lanza
edges.context: Angelo Marino, boss of the San Jose family, had close ties with the San Francisco family boss.

edges.evidence_quote: Marino was close with ... Los Angeles consigliere and FBI informant Frank Bompensiero.
edges.context: Angelo Marino had close connections with a Los Angeles family consigliere.

edges.evidence_quote: His father, Salvatore, a longtime member of the Pittsburgh crime family, handed the company to Marino.
edges.context: Angelo Marino's father was a member of the Pittsburgh family, indicating a familial link between the families.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Francisco crime family , Hells Angels MC
edges.context: The Chicago Outfit is listed as an ally of the San Jose crime family in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Francisco crime family , Hells Angels MC
edges.context: The Dallas crime family is listed as an ally of the San Jose crime family in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Francisco crime family , Hells Angels MC
edges.context: The Hells Angels MC is listed as an ally of the San Jose crime family in the infobox.
